boilWater pre-failure: A pot filled with water is held by a robotic arm, positioned above a stainless steel sink. The sink is embedded in a marble countertop and has a faucet mounted on its rear edge. A soap dispenser with a blue body and gold pump sits on the countertop to the left of the sink. Sunlight streams through a window above the sink, casting reflections on the water’s surface and the sink basin. The robotic arm grips the pot’s handles, placing it directly over the sink’s drain area.
cookEgg pre-failure: A stainless steel gas stove with four burners is mounted on a marble countertop, with two burners lit and producing blue flames. An egg is held by a robotic gripper positioned in front of the oven door, which is closed. The stove has four black control knobs aligned horizontally below the cooktop. White subway tiles form the backsplash behind the stove. The egg is free-floating in space, not inside any container or appliance.
toastBread pre-failure: A dark brown kitchen island with a built-in oven sits on a tiled floor. On top of the island are a loaf of sliced bread, a whole tomato, an egg, a beige mug, and a knife with a yellow handle. A single slice of bread lies on the floor below the island. The oven door is closed. The bread loaf is partially sliced, with one slice removed and placed on the floor. The knife rests beside the bread loaf. The mug is positioned behind the bread and tomato. The tomato and egg are adjacent to each other near the front edge of the island.
